heading.default: A practical starter, built around modern WordPress workflow

description.default: Olenka is designed as a clean working base for custom theme development. Instead of filling the homepage with decoration, it focuses on the pieces that matter most when starting a real project.

subline.default: Made for developers who prefer a modern workflow with room for clean customization.
